Job Description: Engineering Manager — Machine Learning Platform
Company: ScaleAI (Series C AI infrastructure company)
Location: Hyderabad or Remote, India
Employment Type: Full-time
Experience Required: 8+ years (3+ in management)

We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager to lead our ML Platform team of 8-12 engineers.

Requirements:
- 8+ years of software or ML engineering experience
- 3+ years managing engineering teams
- Technical depth in ML systems: training infrastructure, model serving, feature stores
- Track record of shipping ML features to production at scale
- Strong communication — able to translate between engineering and product or business stakeholders

Technical Skills (need not be hands-on in all):
- ML infrastructure: Ray, Spark, Kubeflow, MLflow, or similar
- Model serving: TensorFlow Serving, TorchServe, Triton, or BentoML
- Cloud platforms: AWS, GCP, or Azure (one deep, others familiar)
- Python ecosystem for ML

What you will lead:
- Set technical direction for our ML platform roadmap
- Hire, mentor, and grow the ML platform team
- Partner with ML research team to productionize models
- Define SLOs for model serving and training pipelines
- Drive quarterly planning with cross-functional stakeholders

We value technical managers who still code (20-30% hands-on expected).
